# Master Branch Flow (Legacy Redirect)

This filename is retained only as a compatibility stub.

## Canonical Branch Policy

R.A.I.N. now uses a **single default branch** workflow:

- all contributor PRs target `main`
- pushes to `main` drive the post-merge automation
- there is no `dev -> main` promotion lane
- there is no active `master` branch policy

## Read the Canonical Document

See [`.github/workflows/main-branch-flow.md`](./main-branch-flow.md) for the maintained event map, workflow triggers, and merge path.
